resources.string: Speed camera warning apps are illegal in some countries. You are responsible for checking the laws in your region before use.

Sounds: warning is 3 short beeps at about 12 seconds, followed by the camera purpose when known, for example "Limit 50" or "Red light". Urgent is a single 1 second, higher-pitched beep at about 4 seconds.

RadarLite only activates when your GPS is actively being used by a navigation app. This makes the app very battery efficient but requires you to drive with a navigation app active in order to receive alerts.
Background location is needed so RadarLite can receive passive location updates while using Waze, Google Maps, etc. Select Location and Allow all the time.
Connect to Wi-Fi to update the database
RadarLite needs a camera database before it can alert you. Download it now? (4 MB)
The camera database has not been checked for 7 days or more. Update it now?
